film.title: Sugar Daddies
film.overview: When a girl with a promising future finds herself in financial straits, she makes an agreement with an older man and struggles to keep it secret.

dialogues.dialogue: it was just once a rusty frame, huh?  Yeah.  You keep doing us proud,  it's going to make you a pretty decent graduation present.  Are you serious?
Dad, I just did what I thought I had to do  to get into law school.  I just wanted to keep making you proud.  Do you think it makes me proud  that you prostitute yourself?
to get into law school.  I just wanted to keep making you proud.  Do you think it makes me proud  that you prostitute yourself?  He was going to pay off your medical debt.
